name: Hop Hing Group Holdings Limited
summary: Hop Hing Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates a chain of quick service restaurants. It operates restaurants under the Yoshinoya, Dairy Queen, Uncle Fong, and Chatting brand names in the northern regions of the People's Republic of China. As of December 31, 2019, the company operated 597 restaurants. It also engages in the agricultural operations; and provision of management services. Hop Hing Group Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Yuen Long, Hong Kong.
